description: 学生宿舍(美式常用 dorm)。英式常说 accommodation 或 residence hall。
examples_json: [{"en":"I live in a dormitory near campus.","zh":"我住在校园附近的宿舍。"}]

description: 宿舍或酒店的前台接待处。去 reception desk 办理入住。
examples_json: [{"en":"Go to the reception desk to check in.","zh":"去前台办理入住。"}]

description: 入住登记。check-in time = 入住时间。反义词: check out (退房)。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to check in at the dormitory.","zh":"我需要去宿舍办理入住。"}]

description: 学生身份证明。入住、借书、考试都要用。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please show your student ID to register.","zh":"请出示学生证办理登记。"}]

description: 校园 Wi-Fi 通常叫 eduroam，用学生账号登录。
examples_json: [{"en":"What's the Wi-Fi password for the dorm?","zh":"宿舍的Wi-Fi密码是什么？"}]

description: 宿舍公共洗衣房。英美大学多用 App 支付而非投币。
examples_json: [{"en":"The laundry room is on the first floor.","zh":"洗衣房在一楼。"}]

description: 宿舍公共厨房。冰箱里的食物要贴标签(label your food)。
examples_json: [{"en":"We have a shared kitchen on each floor.","zh":"每层楼都有一个共享厨房。"}]

description: 报修叫 maintenance request。维修工叫 maintenance person 或 handyman。
examples_json: [{"en":"Please call maintenance if the light is broken.","zh":"如果灯坏了请打电话报修。"}]

description: 英美宿舍常见暖气问题。英国多用 radiator(暖气片)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The heater in my room isn't working.","zh":"我房间的暖气坏了。"}]

description: 快递包裹。美式常说 package。前台代收叫 parcel collection。
examples_json: [{"en":"I have a parcel to collect from reception.","zh":"我去前台取包裹。"}]

description: 包括快递(package delivery)和外卖(food delivery)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Where do I pick up food deliveries?","zh":"我在哪取外卖？"}]

description: 各有各的房间、共用公共区域的室友。美式叫 roommate 或 housemate。
examples_json: [{"en":"My flatmate is also a first-year student.","zh":"我的室友也是一年级新生。"}]

description: 大学主修专业。英式常说 course。What's your major? = 你学什么专业？
examples_json: [{"en":"My major is Computer Science.","zh":"我的专业是计算机科学。"}]

description: 兴趣爱好。What do you do in your free time? 比 What are your hobbies? 更自然。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hobbies include photography and hiking.","zh":"我的爱好包括摄影和徒步。"}]

description: 家乡。Describe your hometown = 描述你的家乡。老外常用 nearby [大城市] 来参考。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hometown is a small city near Shanghai.","zh":"我的家乡是上海附近的一个小城市。"}]

description: 每人带一道菜的聚餐形式，在英美大学宿舍非常流行。
examples_json: [{"en":"We're having a potluck on Friday. Want to join?","zh":"我们周五有百乐餐，一起来？"}]

description: 平分账单。国外吃饭 AA 制是常态。It's on me = 我请客。
examples_json: [{"en":"Let's split the bill.","zh":"我们 AA 吧。"}]

description: 共同生活的基本约定。Let's set some ground rules = 我们定些基本规则。
examples_json: [{"en":"Let's set some ground rules for the kitchen.","zh":"我们定一些厨房的基本规则吧。"}]

description: 宿舍规定的安静时段(通常晚上10-11点后)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Quiet hours start at 11pm.","zh":"安静时间从晚上11点开始。"}]

description: 垃圾分类用。一般分 recycling(可回收)和 general waste(一般垃圾)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Put plastic bottles in the recycling bin.","zh":"把塑料瓶放进回收箱。"}]

description: 洗衣机。dryer = 烘干机。cycle = 洗衣周期。
examples_json: [{"en":"How do I use this washing machine?","zh":"这个洗衣机怎么用？"}]

description: 烘干机。英国有些宿舍没有 dryer，用 drying rack(晾衣架)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The dryer takes about 50 minutes.","zh":"烘干机大约需要50分钟。"}]

description: 洗衣液/洗衣粉。liquid detergent = 液体洗衣液。pods = 洗衣球。
examples_json: [{"en":"Where can I buy laundry detergent?","zh":"哪里可以买洗衣液？"}]

description: 衣物柔顺剂。选 fragrance-free(无香型)不会冒犯室友。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do I need fabric softener?","zh":"我需要柔顺剂吗？"}]

description: 设 timer 提醒自己回来取衣服——洗衣房生存第一法则。
examples_json: [{"en":"Set a timer on your phone so you don't forget.","zh":"在手机上设个计时器，别忘了。"}]

description: 图书馆网上目录。查书先在 library catalogue 搜 call number(索书号)。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can search the library catalogue online.","zh":"你可以在网上搜索图书馆目录。"}]

description: 还书截止日期。overdue = 逾期，要罚款(fine)。renew = 续借。
examples_json: [{"en":"When is the due date for this book?","zh":"这本书什么时候到期？"}]

description: 图书馆可预约的独立学习室。期末季至少提前一周预约。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I book a study room for this afternoon?","zh":"我能预约今天下午的学习室吗？"}]

description: 学校每学期给的打印额度(如£10)。用完要 top up(充值)。
examples_json: [{"en":"How do I top up my printing credit?","zh":"怎么充值打印额度？"}]

description: 扫描仪。很多打印机支持 scan to email(扫描发邮箱)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Is there a scanner I can use?","zh":"有扫描仪可以用吗？"}]

description: 宿舍门禁卡，也用于洗衣房、图书馆。不要弄丢——补办要花钱。
examples_json: [{"en":"Use your key card to enter the building.","zh":"用门禁卡进入大楼。"}]

description: 退房。check-in 的反义词。退房时间通常是上午 10-11 点。
examples_json: [{"en":"What time is check-out?","zh":"退房时间是几点？"}]

description: 全球大学通用的 Wi-Fi 网络。用学校邮箱+密码登录。
examples_json: [{"en":"Connect to eduroam with your student account.","zh":"用学生账号连接 eduroam。"}]

description: 宿舍的公共休息室，有沙发、电视。和 lounge 类似。
examples_json: [{"en":"The common room is on the ground floor.","zh":"公共休息室在一楼。"}]

description: 英式宿舍常见的暖气设备。美式多说 heater。
examples_json: [{"en":"The radiator in my room is cold.","zh":"我房间的暖气片是凉的。"}]

description: 上门维修的人。也常说 maintenance person。
examples_json: [{"en":"The handyman will come tomorrow morning.","zh":"维修工明天早上来。"}]

description: 宿舍的电子包裹柜。快递员放进去后你会收到取件码。
examples_json: [{"en":"Your package is in parcel locker number 12.","zh":"你的包裹在12号包裹柜。"}]

description: 英式英语：大一新生。美式叫 freshman。freshers' week = 新生周。
examples_json: [{"en":"Are you a fresher too?","zh":"你也是大一新生吗？"}]

description: 留学生。大家都有类似的经历——刚到陌生国家的紧张感。
examples_json: [{"en":"Most of my flatmates are international students.","zh":"我的室友大部分是国际学生。"}]

description: 刚到异国时的不适应感。每个留学生都会经历，完全正常。
examples_json: [{"en":"I had some culture shock in the first few weeks.","zh":"头几周我经历了文化冲击。"}]

description: 适应/习惯。I'm still getting used to... = 我还在适应...。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm still getting used to the weather here.","zh":"我还在适应这里的天气。"}]

description: 和朋友 casually 待在一起。比正式邀请更轻松。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you want to hang out this weekend?","zh":"周末一起玩吗？"}]

description: 外卖打包盒。吃不完说 Can I get a to-go box?。英式叫 takeaway box。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can I get a to-go box for this?","zh":"这个能打包吗？"}]

description: 室友之间排的打扫轮值表。贴在冰箱上，每人一周。
examples_json: [{"en":"Let's make a cleaning rota for the kitchen.","zh":"我们做个厨房打扫轮值表吧。"}]

description: 西方文化非常看重个人空间。问室友习惯时用 Do you mind if... 比直接问更礼貌。
examples_json: [{"en":"I respect your personal space.","zh":"我尊重你的个人空间。"}]

description: 英美大学洗衣房用的支付 App。如 Circuit Laundry
examples_json: LaundryView。
sort_order: [{"en":"You need to download the laundry app first.","zh":"你需要先下载洗衣 App。"}]

description: 晾衣架。英国很多宿舍没有烘干机，在房间用晾衣架晾衣服。
examples_json: [{"en":"I use a drying rack in my room instead of the dryer.","zh":"我在房间用晾衣架，没用烘干机。"}]

description: 一次一颗的洗衣胶囊。比液体洗衣液更方便，但偏贵。
examples_json: [{"en":"Just throw in a laundry pod and start the machine.","zh":"丢一颗洗衣球进去，启动机器就行。"}]

description: 无香料的。选 fragrance-free 的洗衣液比较不会冒犯对香味敏感的室友。
examples_json: [{"en":"I buy fragrance-free detergent because my flatmate is sensitive to smells.","zh":"我买无香型洗衣液，因为我室友对气味敏感。"}]

description: 洗衣机的脱水阶段。结束后衣服是半干的，可以直接烘干或晾晒。
examples_json: [{"en":"The spin cycle is really loud in this machine.","zh":"这台机器的脱水声音很大。"}]

description: 图书馆书脊上的编号。先在 catalogue 查到 call number，再按号找书架。
examples_json: [{"en":"The call number for this book is 808.042.","zh":"这本书的索书号是 808.042。"}]

description: 超过还书日期。overdue book = 逾期书籍。逾期要交 fine(罚款)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Your book is three days overdue.","zh":"你的书逾期三天了。"}]

description: 图书馆的绝对安静区——不能说话、手机要静音。讨论请去 group study area。
examples_json: [{"en":"The silent zone is on the third floor.","zh":"静音区在三楼。"}]

description: 打印任务排队。从电脑发送到 print queue，然后去任意打印机刷卡 release。
examples_json: [{"en":"Your document is in the print queue. Go to any printer and scan your card.","zh":"你的文件在打印队列里了，去任意打印机刷卡即可。"}]

description: 给账户充值。打印额度用完了去 student portal top up。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to top up my printing credit online.","zh":"我需要在网上充值打印额度。"}]

description: 行李箱。入住第一天拖着它到处走。pack/unpack = 装/取出行李。
examples_json: [{"en":"I need to unpack my suitcase.","zh":"我需要打开行李箱整理。"}]

description: 入住时可能需要缴纳的押金，退宿时退还(如果没有损坏)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do I need to pay a deposit?","zh":"需要交押金吗？"}]

description: lift(英式) / elevator(美式)。搬行李时必问—— Is there a lift?
examples_json: [{"en":"Is there a lift in the building?","zh":"楼里有电梯吗？"}]

description: 英式的一楼 = 美式的 first floor。英国的 first floor 其实是二楼。
examples_json: [{"en":"The laundry room is on the ground floor.","zh":"洗衣房在一楼(英式ground floor)。"}]

description: 宿舍走廊。Your room is at the end of the corridor = 你房间在走廊尽头。
examples_json: [{"en":"My room is at the end of the corridor.","zh":"我房间在走廊尽头。"}]

description: 宿舍公告栏。fire safety、活动通知、打扫轮值表都贴这。
examples_json: [{"en":"Check the notice board for updates.","zh":"查看公告栏了解最新通知。"}]

description: 报修最常用的两个形容词——the sink is leaking(漏水)/the drain is clogged(下水道堵了)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The sink is leaking and the drain is clogged.","zh":"水槽在漏水，下水道也堵了。"}]

description: 宿舍火警。响了必须马上出去——不管是不是演习(fire drill)。
examples_json: [{"en":"The fire alarm went off at 3am last night.","zh":"昨晚凌晨3点火警响了。"}]

description: 学位。bachelor's = 学士
examples_json: master's = 硕士
sort_order: PhD = 博士。What degree are you doing?
column12: [{"en":"I'm doing a bachelor's degree in Engineering.","zh":"我在读工程学学士学位。"}]

description: 英式的 course = 美式的 major(专业)。也指具体的一门课。
examples_json: [{"en":"What course are you on?","zh":"你读什么专业？(英式问法)"}]

description: 和某人相处得好。We get along really well = 我们相处得很好。
examples_json: [{"en":"I get along well with all my flatmates.","zh":"我和所有室友都相处融洽。"}]

description: 和某人 casually 待在一起。Who do you hang out with? = 你平时和谁一起玩？
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually hang out with my flatmates on weekends.","zh":"我周末通常和室友一起。"}]

description: 推荐。Can you recommend...? = 你能推荐...吗？聊家乡/美食时的万能句。
examples_json: [{"en":"Can you recommend any good places to eat around here?","zh":"你能推荐附近好吃的餐厅吗？"}]

description: 剩饭剩菜。吃完可以打包当第二天午饭。
examples_json: [{"en":"We can have the leftovers for lunch tomorrow.","zh":"剩菜可以明天当午饭。"}]

description: 菜系。Chinese cuisine / Italian cuisine。比 food 更正式。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'd love to try authentic Chinese cuisine.","zh":"我很想尝尝地道的中国菜。"}]

description: 室友相处最重要的技能——学会妥协。We need to compromise = 我们需要各退一步。
examples_json: [{"en":"We need to compromise on the cleaning schedule.","zh":"打扫安排上我们需要各退一步。"}]

description: 个人边界。Set boundaries = 设定边界。西方室友文化非常看重这个。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's important to set boundaries early on.","zh":"早点设定边界很重要。"}]

description: 洗衣机上放洗衣液的小抽屉。通常有标记——I (预洗) / II (主洗) / flower(柔顺剂)。
examples_json: [{"en":"Pour the detergent into the drawer, not directly on the clothes.","zh":"把洗衣液倒进槽里，不要直接倒在衣服上。"}]

description: 去渍剂。咖啡渍、油渍——洗之前先涂一下。
examples_json: [{"en":"Do you have any stain remover? I spilled coffee on my shirt.","zh":"有去渍剂吗？我把咖啡洒在衬衫上了。"}]

description: 衣服缩水。热水+烘干机=衣服变小。看 care label(洗标)！
examples_json: [{"en":"My jumper shrank in the dryer.","zh":"我的毛衣在烘干机里缩水了。"}]

description: 参考书——只能在馆内阅读，不能外借。
examples_json: [{"en":"This is a reference book — you can't take it out.","zh":"这是参考书，不能外借。"}]

description: 自助借书机——扫学生卡+书上的 barcode。英美大学图书馆标配。
examples_json: [{"en":"You can borrow books at the self-service kiosk.","zh":"你可以在自助借书机上借书。"}]

description: 图书馆里可以讨论的学习区。不像 silent zone 那么严格。
examples_json: [{"en":"Let's meet at the learning commons on the ground floor.","zh":"我们在一楼的学习共享空间见面吧。"}]

description: 从自己的 laptop 发送打印任务到图书馆打印机。连学校 Wi-Fi 就行。
examples_json: [{"en":"The library supports wireless printing from your laptop.","zh":"图书馆支持从你的笔记本电脑无线打印。"}]
[{"en":"We have a lot of common interests.","zh":"我们有很多共同兴趣。"}]
[{"en":"We share the kitchen and bathroom.","zh":"我们共用厨房和卫生间。"}]
[{"en":"I need some privacy sometimes.","zh":"我有时候需要一些隐私。"}]
[{"en":"It's important to be polite to your roommate.","zh":"对室友礼貌很重要。"}]
[{"en":"We had a nice conversation about our cultures.","zh":"我们聊了各自的文化，聊得很开心。"}]
